instructions: Choose exactly one provider by setting CLAIRE_SEARCH_PROVIDER in your environment or .env when overriding the recommended stack.
DuckDuckGo is fallback-only and is not an enterprise/research-grade provider for internal platform results.
Set CLAIRE_ALLOW_DUCKDUCKGO_FALLBACK=1 only when the operator explicitly accepts no-key fallback metadata quality.
Set CLAIRE_ALLOW_REAL_SEARCH_PROVIDER=1 only when the operator intentionally enables provider metadata queries.
Never paste API keys into ChatGPT.
This template does not enable body reads, browser execution, automatic updates, runtime truth mutation, or autonomous execution.
Provider search results enter quarantine as metadata-only research intake until manually promoted.

required_environment_variables.CLAIRE_ALLOW_REAL_SEARCH_PROVIDER: set to 1 only for operator-enabled metadata-only provider queries
required_environment_variables.CLAIRE_ALLOW_DUCKDUCKGO_FALLBACK: optional; set to 1 only to allow fallback-only DuckDuckGo metadata results
required_environment_variables.CLAIRE_SEARCH_PROVIDER: one of: none, duckduckgo, brave, searchgov, bing, serpapi, tavily
required_environment_variables.SEARCHGOV_ACCESS_KEY: required only if using Search.gov results API
required_environment_variables.SEARCHGOV_AFFILIATE: required only if using Search.gov results API

bing.label: Bing Web Search API
bing.official_setup_url_note: Use your Microsoft/Bing search API key; do not paste it into ChatGPT.

brave.label: Brave Search API
brave.official_setup_url_note: Use your Brave Search API key; do not paste it into ChatGPT.

duckduckgo.label: DuckDuckGo HTML Metadata Search
duckduckgo.official_setup_url_note: No API key required, but fallback-only. Keep disabled for internal enterprise-grade research unless explicitly accepted by the operator.

searchgov.label: Search.gov / GSA Results API
searchgov.official_setup_url_note: Requires a Search.gov affiliate/site handle and access key. Use for federal/public-sector metadata lanes.

none.label: No Provider Configured
none.official_setup_url_note: Runtime/system search remains available. Live web remains disabled.

serpapi.label: SerpAPI
serpapi.official_setup_url_note: Use your SerpAPI key; do not paste it into ChatGPT.

tavily.label: Tavily Search API
tavily.official_setup_url_note: Use your Tavily key; do not paste it into ChatGPT.
